title: Skill Eval Set
description: Trigger eval set consumed by @thdk/skill-eval. Defines the queries used to verify whether a Claude Code skill triggers on the right user prompts.

$schema.description: JSON Schema URL or relative path (ignored at runtime; used by IDEs for validation and completion).

skill_name.description: Name of the skill being evaluated. Must match the `name` field in the skill's SKILL.md frontmatter.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this eval set's purpose (e.g. which conventions or scenarios it covers).

evals.description: List of test queries with their expected triggering behaviour.

query.description: Realistic user query (written the way a developer would actually ask, with concrete context — file names, scenarios, constraints).

should_trigger.description: true if the skill SHOULD fire for this query (positive case); false if it should NOT fire (near-miss negative case).

note.description: Optional internal note explaining what this query is meant to test. Ignored at runtime.
